problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
